name: HWR_FIND_EXPERT_QSTN_B
description: This table will be used to store information regardding OSN conversations used in Ask a Question feature.

columns.Name: QUESTION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Question Id associated with the OSN conversation for Ask a Question feature

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of communication source.

columns.Name: CONVERSATION_ID
columns.Comments: This column used to store the id of  conversation.

columns.Name: OSN_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the OSN convesation linked to the Ask a Question feature

columns.Name: QUESTION_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: This is a comma separated list of Categories associated with a question

columns.Name: QUESTION_TOPICS
columns.Comments: This is a comma separated list of Topics associated with a question.

columns.Name: QUESTION_DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the text of the question being asked.

columns.Name: QSTN_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: QSTN_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QSTN_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: QSTN_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QSTN_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: QSTN_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: QSTN_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: QSTN_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
